description: The Maserati GranTurismo, produced from 2007, is Maserati's flagship grand tourer. The first generation featured Ferrari-derived naturally aspirated V8 engines up to 4.7 litres, with the MC Stradale being the most focused variant. The second generation (2023) introduced Nettuno twin-turbo V6 and fully electric Folgore versions.
